title: Expansion Joint and Other Accessories
intro: Ethios provides components essential in modern construction, designed to absorb and accommodate the natural movements of buildings and structures caused by temperature changes, load variations, or seismic activity. These joints prevent the formation of cracks, water seepage, and other structural damages that can compromise safety and performance over time. Along with the expansion joints, a wide range of accessories are available to support proper installation and long-term functionality.

products.name: AP-5670 HDPE Sheet – 80
products.description: AP-5670 HDPE Sheet – 80 is an expansion-joint accessory from Ethios that accommodates structural movement and helps prevent cracks and water ingress. Contact our technical team for specifications and installation guidance.
